title: Sweet Kenyan Milk Pudding
description: A buttery and crispy Kenyan dessert featuring milk and candy, with a macrobiotic-friendly twist. This energizing treat is perfect for any time of day.

ingredients.name: candy pieces
ingredients.notes: colorful candy pieces like M&M's or Skittles

instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large saucepan, combine the milk, sugar, and butter, and heat over medium heat until the sugar has dissolved.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the flour and eggs.
Add the flour mixture to the saucepan and stir until well combined.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the vanilla extract.
Pour the mixture into a 9x13 inch baking dish and top with candy pieces.
Bake for 25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for 10 minutes before serving.
